question: Identify the root cause of the network fault: which device, what changed, and why it breaks.
description:
R6 removes the `prefix-sid index 6` from its Loopback0 IS-IS
configuration. R6's loopback is still advertised as a plain IS-IS
prefix (reachable via IP) but no SR label is associated with it.
Other routers can no longer push an SR label stack to reach R6 — only
plain IP forwarding works. SR-TE policies whose path goes through R6
break. iBGP-LU/BGP-LU paths that anchor on R6's loopback SID are
unresolved.
expected_rca:
Root cause: on R6, the prefix-sid was removed from its Loopback0 IS-IS configuration.
R6's loopback (192.0.2.6) is still advertised as a plain IS-IS prefix and reachable by IP, but its IS-IS LSP no longer carries a Prefix-SID sub-TLV, so no router can associate an SR label with R6's loopback or build an SR label stack to reach it. Consequently SR-TE policies and BGP-LU paths that anchor on R6's loopback SID cannot resolve and break, while plain IP forwarding to R6 still works.
Fix: re-add prefix-sid index 6 to R6's Loopback0.
expected_symptoms_summary:
No fault syslog observed after apply — silent scenario; removing
prefix-sid on Loopback0 is a quiet IS-IS LSP attribute change.
Diagnostic ground truth lives in expected_state_diffs.
expected_state_diffs: R6 `show running-config router isis LAB interface Loopback0`: no `prefix-sid` line (baseline: `prefix-sid index 6`). Diff vs R7's Loopback0 — R7 still has `prefix-sid index 7`.
Any router `show segment-routing mpls connected-prefix-sid-map ipv4`: R6's 192.0.2.6/32 row missing (baseline reservation: R2:2, R3:3, R4:4, R6:6, R7:7 — only R6 absent).
R3 `show isis database verbose` for R6's LSPID: R6's Loopback0 prefix carries no Prefix-SID sub-TLV (baseline: index 6).
R2 `show mpls forwarding`: no label entry for 16006 (default SRGB 16000 + index 6) — only plain IP path to R6 remains; SR label stacks anchored on R6's loopback are unresolved.

apply.commands:
configure terminal
router isis LAB
interface Loopback0
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  no prefix-sid

revert.commands:
configure terminal
router isis LAB
interface Loopback0
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  prefix-sid index 6
